title: App Settings - General - Notifications & Device Alerts - Tab is present
scenario: Verify "Notifications & Device Alerts" tab is present under General section in App Settings per Figma design
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Tap the Account or Settings icon to navigate to App Settings.
Scroll down to the General section.
Locate the "Notifications & Device Alerts" tab within the General section.
Compare the presence and appearance of the "Notifications & Device Alerts" tab against the Figma design specification.
expected: The "Notifications & Device Alerts" tab is present under the General section in App Settings, matching the Figma design.
